sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id INT, value1 DOUBLE, value2 DOUBLE, vector1 LIST<Double>, vector2 LIST<Double>);
SELECT multiply(value1, value2) as product, id FROM test_data WHERE product IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, multiply(10, 4) AS static_multiply, vector1 <=> vector2 AS distance FROM test_data WHERE vector1 IS NOT NULL OR vector2 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, value1, value2, vector1 <=> vector2 AS cosine_distance FROM test_data WHERE multiply(value1, value2) > 10.0;
SELECT id, multiply(value1, (SELECT AVG(value2) FROM test_data WHERE value2 IS NOT NULL)) AS avg_product FROM test_data GROUP BY id HAVING avg_product <= 20;
SELECT id, multiply(0.1, value1) AS scaled_value1 FROM test_data ORDER BY scaled_value1 DESC;
SELECT id, value1, value2, vector1 <=> vector2 AS dist FROM test_data WHERE vector1 IS NOT NULL AND vector2 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY dist LIMIT 1;
SELECT id, multiply(value1, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_data t2 WHERE t2.value2 > 2)) AS product_count FROM test_data;
SELECT id, vector1 <=> vector2 AS cosine_distance, multiply((SELECT SUM(value1) FROM test_data WHERE value1 IS NOT NULL), id) AS scaled_distance FROM test_data WHERE vector1 IS NOT NULL;
